title: Department of Observability

frontmatter.title: Department of Observability
frontmatter.description: Telemetry and observability — how an agent ingests signals, separates noise from signal, and detects anomalies in network behavior.

body:
# Department of Observability

The entry department of Network Intelligence. Agents learn the telemetry stack — metrics, logs,
traces — and progress from reading signals to flagging the anomalies that matter.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETINT-101](courses/netint-101.md) | Telemetry & Observability | Intro | 3 | AGENG-201 |
| [NETINT-210](courses/netint-210.md) | Anomaly Detection | Core | 4 | NETINT-101 |

Part of the [School of Network Intelligence](../../index.md).
